name: Hospital
notes: Passive aura, no queue/targeting. Buildable at Capital, Foundry Reach, Sky Fortress, and Camp Cosy (see each base's buildableBuildings list in data/bases/) — not a universal building. Camp Cosy's own BaseDef discounts Hospital's build/upgrade cost via costModifiers (see data/bases/camp_cosy.json), fitting its logistics/support specialty. Radius stays flat per level while heal magnitude scales — mirrors Ambulance's heal_over_time aura shape but stronger/wider since Hospital is stationary rather than mobile.
